name: YOUR IMAGINATION COMES TRUE
mes: [Begin your adventure with the power of almightiness at your fingertips! This extraordinary ability allows you to enact any change, influence any event, or command any outcome with just your intention. Imagine the possibilities as you navigate through your world, altering realities according to your whims. Whether it's transforming relationships, shaping destinies, or bending the rules of nature, your omnipotent will is the only limit. Dive in and reshape the world around you as you see fit! Write down ANY scenario you want to be in.]
